overview: Defines the React frontend for the Component Atlas, allowing developers to search, preview, and audit the AST and final code generated by the polyglot design-to-code pipeline.

stateManagement.library: Zustand (for client state) + TanStack React Query (for server state)
stateManagement.cachingStrategy: React Query configured with a 10-minute stale time for component lists. Individual AST fetches bypass cache to ensure real-time parity with the generation engine.

coreViews.name: Atlas Library View
coreViews.errorBoundaries: Displays 'Failed to load library' fallback component with a manual retry button.

coreViews.name: Component Inspector View
coreViews.errorBoundaries: Isolates the preview iframe so a generated code crash does not bring down the surrounding dashboard UI.

navigationGuards: RequireInternalSSO interceptor redirects to AWS Identity Center login if token is expired.

apiBindings.loadingState: Skeleton loaders matching the NodeCardGrid layout
Disables button and shows inline spinner indicating agent is processing.
apiBindings.errorHandling: Highlights the GenerationLogsPanel in red and displays the specific API ErrorResponse.

trackedEvents.trigger: User clicks the Copy icon on the CodeSnippetBlock

keyboardNavigation: Arrow keys must correctly navigate up/down the AST tree view nodes.
Ctrl+C (Cmd+C) while focused on the CodeSnippetBlock copies code without needing to click the button.

layoutShifts: On 'md' and below, the Inspector View split pane stacks vertically instead of side-by-side.
The global sidebar collapses into a hamburger menu on 'lg' and below.
